scope: AgenC loads AGENC.md instruction tiers, expands bounded include directives, and injects the assembled project instructions into prompt assembly.

requiredBehaviors: Managed, user, project, and local instruction tiers load in deterministic low-to-high priority order.
The project tier walks from project root to current working directory and formats multiple project documents in source order.
Missing tiers are omitted without failing prompt assembly.
edgeCases: An explicit empty project-root marker list scopes project discovery to the current working directory.
Project rule files are appended to the project tier when present.

requiredBehaviors: Instruction include directives expand inline before the tier is assembled.
Include resolution enforces realpath-aware project boundaries.
Rejected includes remain visible through structured warnings and rejection markers.
edgeCases: Missing files, path escapes, circular includes, excessive depth, excessive bytes, null bytes, unreadable files, and non-regular files are rejected.
Symlinks to in-tree regular files are accepted while symlink escapes are rejected.

requiredBehaviors: Turn preparation loads tiered project instructions for the active workspace root.
Assembled project instructions are passed into system prompt construction as the dynamic project-instructions section.
Instruction warnings are exposed to the session warning sink for UI/status surfaces.
edgeCases: Config-provided project-root markers and document byte caps override defaults.
Empty instruction content does not create an inert prompt section.

requiredBehaviors: The single-file project instruction loader returns the closest applicable AGENC.md entry when root and nested instruction files both exist.
The chain loader still returns every project document in root-to-current-directory order for tiered assembly.
edgeCases: Nested override files shadow same-directory base files without dropping outer project documents from the chain.
A large outer project document that exhausts the chain budget cannot prevent the singular loader from selecting the closest nested instruction file.

intentionalReductions: AgenC uses AGENC.md and .agenc/rules names for product-owned instruction files.
Team memory, append-only daily-log mode, analytics cohort branches, and provider-specific feature flags are owned by the memory subsystem rather than this prompt-inclusion item.
The include syntax is explicit line-level @include to avoid routing normal @file mentions through prompt assembly.
